moments.title: World Cup Final Showdown
moments.blurb: The FIFA World Cup 2026 culminates this Sunday, July 19th, with the final match at MetLife Stadium in New Jersey, USA.

angles.name: Final Countdown
angles.copy: Who's lifting the World Cup trophy this Sunday? The countdown is on for the biggest game in football!

angles.name: Global Hype
angles.copy: It's the World Cup Final this weekend! Where are you watching? The whole planet will be tuned in.

angles.name: Road to Glory
angles.copy: After weeks of drama, it all comes down to Sunday. Who do you think will be crowned champions of the world?

moments.title: Official Charts Update
moments.blurb: The Official UK Singles Chart gets its weekly refresh this Friday, revealing the nation's new number one and biggest movers.

angles.name: New No.1
angles.copy: Who's eyeing up the top spot? The Official UK Singles Chart updates this Friday! Any predictions for the new Number One?

angles.name: Chart Battle
angles.copy: The battle for the top 40 continues! Get ready for the latest Official UK Singles Chart update this Friday.

moments.title: Love Island UK Drama
moments.blurb: The 13th series of Love Island UK, which began on June 1st, continues to bring daily drama and romance from the villa.

angles.name: Villa Vibes
angles.copy: Another night, another dose of Love Island drama! Who's your favourite couple in the villa right now?

angles.name: Grafting Hard
angles.copy: Are we ready for another night of grafting and bombshells? Love Island UK is on tonight!

moments.title: Happy Birthday Brian May
moments.blurb: Queen's legendary guitarist Brian May, born July 19, 1947, turns 79 this Sunday.

angles.name: Guitar Hero
angles.copy: Happy 79th Birthday this Sunday to the iconic guitarist from Queen, Brian May! What's your favourite Queen riff?

angles.name: Queen Legend
angles.copy: Celebrating the incredible Brian May, who turns 79 on Sunday! A true rock legend.

moments.title: Happy Birthday Carlos Santana
moments.blurb: The legendary guitarist Carlos Santana, born July 20, 1947, celebrates his 79th birthday this Monday.

angles.name: Smooth Grooves
angles.copy: Happy 79th Birthday on Monday to the one and only Carlos Santana! His guitar work is timeless.

angles.name: Latin Rock Icon
angles.copy: Wishing a very Happy 79th Birthday to the legendary Carlos Santana this Monday! What's your go-to Santana track?

moments.title: Happy Birthday Yusuf / Cat Stevens
moments.blurb: Folk rock icon Yusuf / Cat Stevens, born July 21, 1948, turns 78 this Tuesday.

angles.name: Tea for the Tillerman
angles.copy: Happy 78th Birthday this Tuesday to the incredible Yusuf / Cat Stevens! So many classic songs.

angles.name: Folk Legend
angles.copy: Celebrating the poetic genius of Yusuf / Cat Stevens, who turns 78 on Tuesday! What's your favourite of his tracks?

moments.title: Happy Birthday Don Henley
moments.blurb: Eagles co-founder and drummer Don Henley, born July 22, 1947, celebrates his 79th birthday this Tuesday.

angles.name: Eagles Drummer
angles.copy: Happy 79th Birthday this Tuesday to the legendary Don Henley of The Eagles! A true rock voice.

angles.name: Voice of a Generation
angles.copy: From Hotel California to his solo hits, Don Henley turns 79 on Tuesday! What's your favourite Henley moment?

moments.title: School's Out for Summer
moments.blurb: School summer holidays are starting or drawing very close for many across the UK this week, bringing a change of pace for families.

angles.name: Holiday Mode
angles.copy: The summer holidays are officially here (or very nearly!) for many schools across the UK. What are your plans?

angles.name: School's Out
angles.copy: Kids breaking up for summer this week? Get ready for six weeks of fun!

moments.title: UK Weather Watch
moments.blurb: The UK is set for a mix of summer weather this week, with some regions potentially seeing warmer spells.

angles.name: Summer Forecast
angles.copy: What's the weather doing where you are this week? Fingers crossed for some sunshine!

angles.name: Heatwave Watch
angles.copy: Is a mini-heatwave on its way to the UK this week? Keep an eye on the forecast and stay hydrated!

moments.title: Cardiff City Pre-Season
moments.blurb: Cardiff City's pre-season preparations are in full swing, with a friendly against Cork City scheduled for tonight, July 14th.

angles.name: Bluebirds Back
angles.copy: The Bluebirds are back! Cardiff City's pre-season is well underway – they face Cork City tonight!

angles.name: Championship Ready
angles.copy: Who's excited for the new Championship season? Cardiff City are putting in the work in pre-season, with a friendly tonight!

moments.title: Swansea City Pre-Season
moments.blurb: Swansea City are deep into their pre-season schedule, with new signings and friendlies building towards the Championship kick-off, including an Austrian training camp starting July 17th.

angles.name: Swans Prepare
angles.copy: The Swans are busy in pre-season! What are your hopes for Swansea City in the upcoming Championship campaign?

angles.name: New Season Hopes
angles.copy: Pre-season friendlies are in full swing for Swansea City! Who are you looking forward to seeing this season?

moments.title: Exeter City Pre-Season
moments.blurb: Exeter City's pre-season schedule is well underway, with friendlies preparing the Grecians for the League Two season, including a match against Truro City on July 18th.

angles.name: Grecians Gear Up
angles.copy: Exeter City are back in action with pre-season friendlies! How are the Grecians looking for the new League Two campaign?

angles.name: Devon Football
angles.copy: Pre-season preparations are in full swing for Exeter City! Who's ready for some League Two football?
